name: Bang Pu industrial and coastal corridor
capture_notes: Bang Pu industrial estate, municipal growth, and Sukhumvit coastal corridor demand. Strong mix of commuter, worker, and service-route charging need.

name: Kheha-Praksa urban rail and commuter band

name: Ancient City and coastal destination band
capture_notes: Destination-oriented demand around Muang Boran and the recreation coast; relevant but should stay below the industrial-commuter core.
